title: DfE update 3 December 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action Post-16 monitoring dashboard now live   Information 2024 to 2025 final reconciliation statements   Your feedback FE workforce survey to share with your teachers     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Post-16 monitoring dashboard now live   Reminder Get involved with user research to help shape the future of how you interact with DfE services, information, and guidance   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action Post-16 monitoring dashboard now live   Information 2024 to 2025 final reconciliation statements   Information Local authority webinars 2025 now uploaded to the DfE YouTube channel   Your feedback Get involved with user research to help shape the future of how you interact with DfE services, information, and guidance    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
